game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **MONOPOLY:** Players participate in a digital board game by taking turns tapping to roll two six-sided dice, moving their chosen token around the iconic Monopoly board. The core mechanic involves acquiring properties by landing on unowned spaces and purchasing them for a fixed price, or participating in an auction if the property is declined. Landing on an opponent's property requires paying rent, which scales significantly based on property development, allowing up to four houses and then one hotel per property. Progression is session-based, focused on strategically bankrupting all other players through rent collection and property monopolies, while "Chance" and "Community Chest" cards introduce random financial or movement events. The game concludes when only one player remains solvent, declared the winner, with multiplayer options including local pass-and-play on a single device or online matchmaking against up to three other players.
game_info.description: Experience the classic property trading game in digital form! Roll dice to move around the board, buy properties, build houses and hotels, and collect rent from opponents. Strategic property management and smart investments are key to bankrupting your opponents. Watch out for Chance and Community Chest cards that can dramatically change your fortune. The last player standing wins!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and UI choices
Space: Roll dice / Confirm actions
Z: Buy property / Build house / End turn
Shift: Auction / Decline property
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and property acquisition test. Validates that the player can roll dice, move around the board correctly, and purchase properties when landing on them. Tests the fundamental game loop mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Roll dice on each turn, move the token accordingly, and attempt to purchase any unowned property landed on. Continue for multiple turns to ensure movement wraps around the board correctly and property ownership is tracked properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player successfully completes multiple turns, moves the correct number of spaces based on dice rolls, and acquires several properties. The game state correctly updates with property ownership and the player's cash decreases appropriately after purchases.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test through aggressive property acquisition and rent collection. Tests the full game flow including bankrupting AI opponents to achieve victory. Validates end-game conditions and win state detection.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively purchase all available properties, focus on completing color sets to build houses and hotels, and maximize rent collection from AI opponents. Make strategic decisions to force opponents into bankruptcy through high rent payments while maintaining sufficient cash reserves.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test successfully bankrupts all AI opponents through strategic property development and rent collection. The game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state when only the test player remains solvent, demonstrating that the win condition logic works correctly.
